texts.t002: Genuine SIE products with warranty, installed or dispatched pan-India. Confirm sizing on WhatsApp, pay securely online.
texts.t004: Every order is confirmed by our team before payment — so you never buy the wrong size or model.
texts.t008: Send your opening size/photo — we confirm the exact model so returns never happen.
texts.t009: UPI, cards, netbanking — payment goes only through verified Razorpay links, never bank transfers to unknown accounts.
texts.t010: Spares ship pan-India; systems are installed by SMARTIE teams or our city dealers.
